global_authenticated_master_data.description: Shared reference data readable by active authenticated users; writes remain backend-only.

global_admin_configuration.description: System-wide configuration readable or mutable only with an explicit global capability.

facility_scoped.description: Business data that must be queried and authorized through an effective facility grant.

user_private_or_participant.description: Documents visible only to their owner, target user, or explicit participants.

backend_only_internal.description: Operational metadata never read directly by the browser.

denormalizationBlockers.issue: The workplace exists only in employee_profiles, which Firestore Rules cannot reverse-query safely.
denormalizationBlockers.required: Denormalize workplace_facility_id onto each user document.

denormalizationBlockers.issue: Top-level items contain session_id but no facility field.
denormalizationBlockers.required: Denormalize warehouse_id from the parent session.

denormalizationBlockers.issue: Top-level records contain a report reference but no facility field.
denormalizationBlockers.required: Denormalize warehouse_id from the nonconformity report.

denormalizationBlockers.issue: warehouse_id is optional, so facility events can become unscopable.
denormalizationBlockers.required: Require facility_id for facility events and reserve null for global-admin events.

denormalizationBlockers.issue: Polymorphic entity_type/entity_id cannot be joined dynamically in Rules.
denormalizationBlockers.required: Add access_class and facility_id, or serve attachments through the backend.

denormalizationBlockers.issue: Legacy polymorphic workflow instances and tasks have no facility field.
denormalizationBlockers.required: Denormalize facility_id or make the legacy workflow backend/admin-only.

resolvedDenormalization.resolution: Phase 4 writes top-level warehouse_id on the parent; child rules inherit it.
Phase 4 aligns backend and frontend on {warehouseId}_{period} and warehouse_id.
